name: xau_asia_london_range_breakout_m5
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, when the Asia session (00:00-06:00 UTC) range is between 0.5x and 2.0x ATR(14), a London-session (07:00-10:00 UTC) true breakout (close beyond range by >=0.5 ATR with body >=1.0 ATR) within the first 9 bars continues in the breakout direction for at least 1.5R before reverting, producing PF>=2.0 over 200+ trades.

entry.long: price closes above asia_high + 0.5*ATR(14), candle body >= 1.0*ATR(14), within first 9 bars of london_window, first_breakout_of_day=true, range/ATR in [0.5,2.0]
entry.short: price closes below asia_low - 0.5*ATR(14), candle body >= 1.0*ATR(14), within first 9 bars of london_window, first_breakout_of_day=true, range/ATR in [0.5,2.0]

exit.sl: opposite side of asia range or 1.2*ATR(14), whichever is tighter
